statement: In every magma, Equation 3217 (`x = (((y * z) * z) * y) * w`) implies Equation 2462 (`x = (x * ((y * x) * z)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0488
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) z) y) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op (op y x) z)) x)
